AIV Core Object

Design-driven AIV internal object pattern with separate 910B and 950B presets. 910B uses the simplified Scalar + UB + Vector topology; 950B keeps the full DCache, ICache, ND-DMA Cache, SIMT, SIMD, and Vector topology.

pattern id: aiv-core-object presets: ascend910b / ascend950b contract: config-driven DOM + JS grid + SVG routes

Ascend 910B AIV

Ascend 950B AIV
